newTests.name: Verify Name field accepts valid input.
Verify the Home screen sponsor toggle functionality (OFF).
Verify the form title when creating a new Talent.
Confirm that the login CTA button displays Sign In and has the specified color.
Configuration Menu Item Visibility
Check if the password input field has Password as its label and Enter your password as its placeholder.
Ensure LinkedIn field has correct label, icon, and placeholder.
Ensure Profile Picture field has correct label, a tooltip with specific specs, and a clickable media box.
Tracks Tab Selection and Dynamic Content Update
Ensure selected programs can be deleted individually from the field.
Ensure the Social Media Links section header is present and left-aligned below the Linked Sponsors & Programs section.
Ensure a selected sponsor can be deleted from the field.
Confirm the header with the text Select a project to continue is displayed in the top of the middle section and is centered aligned.
Verify Status Filters Appearance - With Talent
Verify the presence and alignment of the Select All feature.
Verify Select All Feature Appearance
Verify Change CTA functionality after image upload.
Ensure only one sponsor can be selected and is displayed correctly after selection.
Verify that the Title / Company column correctly displays Title (darker) and Company (lighter) from the form.
Ensure the Basic Information section header is present and left-aligned below the form header.
As a Content Fragment Model administrator, I need to add a new text field named GPS Link to the Locations Content Fragment Model to store GPS coordinates or a map link.
Ensure that when navigating to the program calendar, the Calendar view toggle is highlighted or marked as active, while the Listing toggle is inactive.
Ensure a new vendor can be successfully created by providing a valid name.
Check the Secondary CTA Copy Text field for correct labeling, single-line input, placeholder, and secondary CTA styling indication.
Verify that clicking Talent on the main navigation leads to the Talent Listing screen, and the default view correctly displays content fragments from AEM.
Verify the Home screen sponsor toggle functionality (ON).
Ensure Primary CTA Link field has correct label, icon, and placeholder.
Ensure Primary CTA Copy Text field has correct label, placeholder, and associated with primary CTA styling.
Check X (Twitter) field for correct labeling, icon, single-line input, and placeholder.
Check that when creating a new experience, the form title correctly displays Create New Experience.
Verify Active Tab UI - Push Notifications
Ensure Basic Information header is present and left-aligned.
Ensure Secondary CTA Copy Text field has correct label, placeholder, and associated with secondary CTA styling.
Ensure clicking the Media box opens the Media Library Widget.
Check the Location field for correct labeling, dropdown functionality, and placeholder text.
Verify Default Active Tab on First Entry - Push Notifications
Verify that the Select All checkbox allows selecting all talents in the table and correctly displays the total count.
Verify Default Inactive Tab on First Entry - Program Notifications
Verify Main Navigation Layout Change to Vertical
Verify the visibility and text of the Select All feature.
Fill out all required and some optional fields in the Add Program form with valid data and save it.
Verify that the Back to Talents CTA correctly returns the user to the Talent listing screen, preserving the previous day tab.
Check Instagram field for correct labeling, icon, single-line input, and placeholder.
Verify that individual vendor data rows are displayed in the table body when vendors exist in the system.
Verify that selecting Draft filter only shows draft talents with a gray status bar.
Ensure the Back CTA is visible in the correct location with the specified text and icon, and correctly navigates back to the previous screen (Experiences listing) while retaining the active day tab.
Test that clicking on the Design Experience dropdown successfully expands it to show the list of experience options.
Check facebook field for correct labeling, icon, single-line input, and placeholder.
Check the Sponsor field for correct labeling, search icon, dropdown functionality, and placeholder text.
Ensure the Call to Action section header is present and left-aligned below the Social Media Links section.
Ensure that tapping the Account CTA triggers the existing behavior of displaying the logout option.
Verify that the table headers (Vendor Name, Status, Actions) are clearly visible when the vendor listing table contains data.
Ensure the Linked Sponsor & Programs section header is present and left-aligned below the Photo section.
Check the Secondary CTA Link field for correct labeling, icon, single-line input, and placeholder.
Ensure Photo header is present and left-aligned.
Check if the Create New CTA is present, correctly aligned, and redirects to the ECC: Programming | Program Form upon clicking, as per acceptance criteria 2.
Verify that when a user first enters the Configuration section, the Tracks tab is inactive by default.
Confirm that only the Account Call-To-Action CTA is present in its designated area and no other interactive elements occupy this space.
Verify that clicking Cancel on a new, empty form (Draft status) closes the form and does not create any Talent.
Ensure a valid image is uploaded, displayed correctly, and the Change CTA appears.
Locations Tab - Form and Empty State Visibility
Check if the email input field has Email as its label and Enter your email as its placeholder.
Ensure that the Notification Log tab is present on the UI and is positioned to the right of the Program Notifications tab in the middle section.
Verify the presence and default inactive state of the Headliner filter.
Ensure the Design Experience dropdown is visible on the page when loaded and displays a default placeholder text.
Verify the presence of the optional Title and Company fields with their respective placeholders.
Check the Description field for correct labeling, multi-line input, and placeholder text.
Verify that for a new or draft talent, only the Publish CTA is displayed, and clicking it saves and publishes the talent.
Verify that selecting Unpublished filter only shows unpublished talents with an orange status bar.
Verify the default appearance of the Media box and its functionality to open the Media Library Widget.
Verify the navigation functionality of the Create New CTA.
Ensure the Select All checkbox and accompanying text are correctly displayed below the day tabs, left-aligned in the Calendar View.
Verify that upon first entering the Talents screen, the first day tab is active by default.
Verify navigation upon clicking the Create New CTA.
Check the Primary CTA Copy Text field for correct labeling, single-line input, placeholder, and primary CTA styling indication.
Ensure Instagram field has correct label, icon, and placeholder.
Verify that the Biography or Description column displays the biography, truncating after a maximum of 4 lines.
Select a specific experience level from the dropdown and ensure that the dropdown field updates to display the selected value.
Ensure facebook field has correct label, icon, and placeholder.
Verify whether table headers (e.g., Vendor Name, Status, Actions) are visible when the table is empty.
Verify that for a published talent, Unpublish CTA is available, and clicking it unpublishes the talent.
Verify Account Access Relocation to Navigation Bottom
Verify navigation behavior when clicking links in the web application.
Verify Headliner Filter Appearance
Verify the display and alignment of the section title Participants & Sponsors
Test that clicking the Talent link in the main navigation for a specific project successfully displays the Talent Listing screen.
Verify that upon clicking Configuration in the ECC Main Navigation, the middle section updates to display Locations and Tracks tabs at the top left.
Ensure Secondary CTA Link field has correct label, icon, and placeholder.
Ensure that the Experiences Listing Table is visible and contains the correct column headers: NAME, DESCRIPTION, LOCATION, SPONSOR, and LINKS, as per acceptance criteria 3 and 3A-E.
Verify the visibility and positioning of the Create New Call To Action (CTA).
Verify the display and non-interactivity of the screen name.
Verify the presence of the optional Biography multi-line field with its placeholder.
Verify that the Name column correctly displays the Talent Name from the form.
Confirm that the header of the login page displays the text login to event client console.
Verify Tracks tab content display.
Verify that the Social Links column displays icons for provided social links and missing links do not leave empty space.
Initial Display after Configuration Selection
Verify the presence of Social Media Links header and the Instagram field with icon and placeholder.
Ensure Twitter field has correct label, icon, and placeholder.
Verify profile picture selection control exists and is clickable.
Ensure Location field is a dropdown, left-aligned, optional, and has the correct placeholder.
Verify the presence of Photos header and Profile Picture field with tooltip showing specifications.
Verify that selecting Published filter only shows published talents with a green status bar.
Ensure the Photo section header is present and left-aligned below the Basic Information section.
Ensure the Back CTA is displayed correctly, with the correct text and icon, and navigates back to the previous screen, preserving the day tab.
Test that clicking the Create New Talent CTA button successfully navigates the user to the Talent Form screen.
Verify the presence of Basic Information header and the mandatory Name field with placeholder and asterisk.
Ensure Description field is multi-line, left-aligned, optional, and has the correct placeholder.
Ensure the Who should receive this notification? header is displayed correctly on the Program Notification creation form.
Ensure clicking Cancel discards changes and returns to the previous screen without saving.
Verify that selecting All filter displays all talents regardless of status.
Verify CTA UI matches Figma design
Verify the presence of Performance Day checkboxes, showing only relevant event days.
Verify the Create Talent Form UI is accessible and displayed correctly.
Ensure that there is no Register button or link visible on the login page.
Ensure the Schedule section title is present and left-aligned, along with correct field names and mandatory asterisks.
Verify that a user can successfully log in with valid credentials.
Verify image crop interface appears after selection.
Ensure clicking the Change CTA allows modification of the uploaded image via Media Library Widget.
Verify the visual appearance of the Locations tab when it is active.
Ensure Call to Action header is present and left-aligned.
Check the Programs field for correct labeling, search icon, dropdown functionality, and placeholder text.
Ensure Tiktok field has correct label, icon, and placeholder.
Ensure Social Media Links header is present and left-aligned.
Check the Name field for correct labeling, mandatory asterisk, single-line input, and placeholder text.
Ensure that when creating a new program, the form title correctly displays Create New Program
Ensure multiple programs can be selected and are displayed correctly with individual delete options.
Verify navigation to Configuration menu and initial display of tabs.
Ensure the form title is Create New Vendor when opening the form for a new vendor creation.
Verify that the Create Vendor button (or equivalent) is prominently displayed in the top section when no vendors have been created yet.
Ensure the Schedule Modal appears correctly with a darkened background when Schedule is tapped.
Ensure that the screen name Experiences is correctly displayed on the page and is not clickable or interactive, as per acceptance criteria 1.
Ensure an error is shown and the vendor is not saved if the Name field is left empty.
Verify the application logo is updated.
Verify REVOLT Logo Update and Top-Left Placement
Ensure Name  field has an asterisk, left-aligned, single-line, and correct placeholder.
Check TikTok field for correct labeling, icon, single-line input, and placeholder.
Check LinkedIn field for correct labeling, icon, single-line input, and placeholder.
